race.description: The Man Walk Geelong Mdn Plate
race.comment: DELAHRA (7) Doubtland filly from Bulahdelah Miss on debut. Recent on-pace Caulfield trial win has her primed for a big debut. Can make an impact. GOLD CHALICE (4) is a $1m yearling by leading sire Snitzel from the stakes-winner Harlow Gold. Was given his most serious hitout at the latest jumpout and attacked the line nicely. Worth noting he's Craig Williams' only ride for the day. Well placed and everything points towards a big run. BOOM BOSS (1) might get run off his feet early but will attack the line if his last jumpout is any guide. Include. VIXEN VIBES (15) trialled well and then was a respectable second on debut at Morphettville over 1100m. Will take valuable race experience from that outing. In the mix. BOOM BOSS (1) is a colt by Spirit Of Boom out of Envy Of All making his first appearance. Progressed nicely to take out his most recent trial with today's rider Logan Bates steering. Among the leading chances.
